description: Evaluates compliance management service maturity, compliance software and scanning, process and standards alignment, metrics and teams, endpoint posture policy, asset hardening across applications, devices, and network assets, and SOC transport of compliance changes.

capabilities.name: Service Exists and in good condition
capabilities.description: A compliance management service is defined in the enterprise and reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Compliance management service defined in the enterprise
Service reviewed frequently for efficacy

capabilities.name: Compliance management system/software
capabilities.description: The enterprise uses compliance management software to monitor compliance, with appropriate scope, automation, configuration review, and integration for attribute-based decision making.
evaluation_focus: Compliance management software for enterprise-wide monitoring
Scope across enterprise and subsidiaries
Automation for compliance management and scanning
Software configuration reviewed to align with business
Integration with decision points and network technologies

capabilities.name: Compliance scanning
capabilities.description: Compliance scanning covers assets across locations with automation and integration to remediation.
evaluation_focus: Software can scan assets for compliance
Scanning deployed for all assets across all locations
Compliance scanning automated
Scan results integrated with remediation software

capabilities.name: Compliance management Process
capabilities.description: An established, documented compliance management process is implemented with automation and frequent review.
evaluation_focus: Established documented compliance management process
Process implemented enterprise-wide or scoped
Automation incorporated into the process
Process reviewed frequently

capabilities.name: Compliance Alignment to Stnadards and regulations
capabilities.description: Relevant standards and regulations requiring alignment are officially documented and reviewed on a defined cadence.
evaluation_focus: Official documentation of relevant standards and regulations
Frequent review of compliance requirements

capabilities.name: Function specific compliance metrics
capabilities.description: Compliance metrics are officially designed, documented, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Officially designed and documented compliance metrics
Frequent review of compliance metrics

capabilities.name: Compliance teams
capabilities.description: Compliance management teams manage the overall compliance management service.
evaluation_focus: Compliance management teams manage the overall service

capabilities.name: Policy and compliance specialist
capabilities.description: Policy and compliance specialists are part of compliance teams.
evaluation_focus: Policy and compliance specialists on compliance teams

capabilities.name: Endpoint compliance (posture) policy/rules
capabilities.description: Endpoint compliance policy is formalized, scoped, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Formal documented endpoint compliance policy
Policy scope across devices and locations
Endpoint compliance policy reviewed frequently

capabilities.name: Asset Hardening and compliance alignment
capabilities.description: Formal hardening processes align applications, endpoints/devices, and network assets with compliance, including automation, patching, and frequent review.
evaluation_focus: Application hardening process and coverage
Endpoint and device hardening aligned to compliance
Network asset hardening process and automation
Frequent review of hardening processes

capabilities.name: Monitoring changes in compliance
capabilities.description: Compliance changes are formally documented, securely transported, and dynamically captured for the SOC.
evaluation_focus: Documented process for transporting compliance changes to the SOC
Secure transport of compliance changes to the SOC
Dynamic compliance changes captured and transferred to the SOC

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
